item.title:
OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 1min THE RESULTS!
Confirmation of this afternoon's results, where eight players will move on
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 1min THE RESULTS!
Confirmation of this afternoon's results, where eight players will move on to tonight's final session in Sindelfingen!
http:// bit.ly/PDCTVLive #ET5 1 6 2 mil

item.title: PDCEurope: PDC Darts Europe @PDCEurope · 5min Round Three of the ELTEN Safety Shoes European Darts Grand Prix is through! 68
item.description: PDC Darts Europe @PDCEurope · 5min Round Three of the ELTEN Safety Shoes European Darts Grand Prix is through! 68

item.title:
OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 6min JOB DONE FOR PRICE!
Gerwyn Price closes the curtain on an epic afternoon of darts in Sin
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 6min JOB DONE FOR PRICE!
Gerwyn Price closes the curtain on an epic afternoon of darts in Sindelfingen, beating Chris Dobey with an average of close to 106!
http:// bit.ly/PDCTVLive #ET5 27 6 mil
